headline: HDS is UNFROZEN (Adrian, 2026-07-10; see #155) and back to active development under epic #124, the Tailwind × multi-tenant token-utility burndown. The Ralph loop has been merging PRs continuously since the freeze (#135–#159), including epic #124 children #125 (spacing/breakpoints/border-width/font-size token utilities), #127 (interactive surface state tokens), and the ADR ratification in #131. Package remains published as @hirobius/design-system on npm.
next: Continue burning down epic #124's remaining children: #126, #128, #129, #130, #132, #133, #134
Restore pull_request/push triggers in .github/workflows/{chromatic,release}.yml — still manual-dispatch-only from the freeze, now stale
Reconcile the superseded wind-down epic #80 now that #124 is the active roadmap
